title: Public install route hotfix
summary: Forge Method now hides core-runtime project state for public installed packages and routes normal users to a separate project workspace.
highlights: Installed public Forge packages no longer expose committed Forge core state as a normal project.
Normal users are guided to open or create a separate project workspace when they start inside the installed package.
Core-runtime work now requires explicit maintainer intent through FORGE_METHOD_CORE_DEV=1 or local .forge-method/core-dev.local, plus --allow-runtime-state.
Plugin manifest detection tolerates UTF-8 BOM so Windows-authored manifests still activate package protections.
